text: I feel the distinct excitement of entering a new space steeped in curiosity—a research and development hub humming softly with the promise of discovery. The neon lights and open displays invite a sense of anticipation. I am both an observer and a participant, surrounded by the works and dreams of those who strive to understand and innovate. There’s a quiet awe as words on the screen evoke openness and wonder, echoing my own state of mind.
